The third episode of our TAL (Theater Research Laboratory) podcast series is now available!

In this episode, actor Nadi Güler, who worked as a lab technician at TAL for many years, shares his contributions to the creative process, his memories of Ayla and Beklan Algan, and the projects he was involved in. You can access our podcast via the link on the @tal_arsiv profile.
